description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense perimeter of mature trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The house features a green gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns, with a driveway leading up to the entrance. The front facade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows and a central door, while the side and rear views reveal additional windows and a small garden area. The property is enclosed by a thick hedge or tree line, providing both shade and privacy. The driveway and walkway are paved, and a car is parked near the entrance, indicating residential use. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood with a focus on greenery and outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a green gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by dense trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, symmetrical windows, and driveway with a car, all framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green roof, driveway, and the open space between the trees at the front boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the thick tree line, with the back of the bungalow partially visible through the foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, green roof, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
